title: 03 giant hand peels the car shell
prompt: Use case: compositing. Asset type: cinematic storyboard action frame. Image 1 controls Tina's identity, wardrobe, pink lychee product, giant-hand scale, and grounded neighborhood. Image 2 supplies only the concept of the car shell opening around seated Tina; reject its orange gummy upholstery, parachute, floating sky, rainbow palette, and exaggerated reaction. Use an exterior passenger-side three-quarter tracking view. A colossal thumb and forefinger carefully pinch a loosened corner of the car roof. The thin blue-gray outer skin peels backward in one continuous flexible sheet, curling like lychee skin, while the black structural frame, seat, wheels, and Tina remain intact. Tina watches the enormous fingers with fascinated calm, holding the gummy and bag. No torn jagged metal, debris, crash, or body contact.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one frame from a coherent live-action Peelerz commercial sequence. Maintain Tina as the same young woman with long brown hair, blue jacket, black top, pink lychee gummy, and pink Peelerz package. Photoreal cinematic advertising, real suburban textures, gentle deadpan wonder. The giant hand is warm, careful, and curious rather than threatening. One precise scale rule, no destruction, panic, horror, cartoon style, captions, panel borders, watermarks, or generic candyland.
